intro.headline: We're a small studio with an oversized appetite for craft.
intro.paragraph: Founded in 2018, we're a team of designers, engineers and motion artists working with founders and brand leaders to build the next chapter of their digital presence.

values.title: Craft over volume
values.description: Fewer projects, deeper care. Every pixel and frame is intentional.

values.title: Strategy first
values.description: We design from positioning outward, not the other way around.

values.title: Motion as language
values.description: Movement clarifies hierarchy and gives brands a heartbeat.

values.title: Built to last
values.description: Modular systems and clean code that outlive launch day.
